title: Create room and display generated Room ID
description: Verifies a user can create a room from the lobby and the generated room ID is shown.

steps.description: Verify a generated room ID is displayed in the UI
Verify the lobby shows a player list

title: Join an existing room and see lobby player list
description: Verifies a user can enter a room ID and join to see the lobby state with players.

steps.description: Fill text into the room ID field with ROOM123
Verify the lobby with a player list is displayed

title: Join room then start game to reach game screen
description: Verifies starting a game from the lobby transitions to the game screen.

steps.description: Fill text into the room ID field with ROOM123
Verify the game screen is displayed

title: Attempt to join with invalid room ID shows room-not-found error
description: Verifies the lobby shows an error state when a non-existent room ID is used.

steps.description: Fill text into the room ID field with INVALID_ROOM_ID
Verify a room not found error message is visible

title: Attempt to join a full room shows room-full error
description: Verifies the lobby shows an error state when trying to join a full room.

steps.description: Fill text into the room ID field with FULLROOM
Verify a room full error message is visible

title: Empty room ID input prevents joining via UI validation
description: Verifies the user cannot proceed with joining when the room ID field is empty.

steps.description: Fill text into the room ID field with
Verify a room ID validation or required-field error is visible

title: Keyboard controls move/rotate and hard drop during gameplay
description: Verifies core keyboard inputs affect the active piece during an active match.

steps.description: Verify the active piece position changes on the board after movement/rotation and hard drop

title: Clearing lines updates score and removes lines
description: Verifies clearing one or more lines causes visible line removal and score change.

steps.description: Use arrow keys and hard drop to complete at least one line clear
Verify at least one completed line is removed from the board

title: Clearing 2 lines shows special piece available indicator
description: Verifies clearing exactly two lines results in a special piece notification/indicator.

steps.description: Use arrow keys and hard drop to clear 2 lines in a single placement
Verify a special piece available notification is displayed

title: Keyboard focus loss prevents piece movement until refocus
description: Verifies that losing focus disables keyboard controls and refocusing restores them.

steps.description: Click outside the game area to remove keyboard focus
Verify the active piece does not move while focus is outside the game area
Click the game play area to refocus
Verify the active piece moves after refocusing the game area

title: Game over displays game over screen with final result
description: Verifies the game over state is reached and the final placement/score is shown.

steps.description: Play until the stack reaches the top and the match ends for the player
Verify a game over screen is displayed
Verify a final placement or final score is displayed

title: Earn special piece then send to an opponent successfully
description: Verifies a player can earn a special piece and send it to a selected opponent.

steps.description: Fill text into the room ID field with ROOM_WITH_OPPONENT
Use arrow keys and hard drop to clear 2 lines in a single placement
Select an opponent from the available opponent list
Verify the special piece is no longer available for the sender after sending

title: Sending special without selecting opponent shows validation error
description: Verifies the UI prevents sending a special piece without choosing a target.

steps.description: Fill text into the room ID field with ROOM_WITH_OPPONENT
Use arrow keys and hard drop to clear 2 lines in a single placement
Verify a select-opponent validation error is visible
